29.reason: 这里缺少对 i+cnt 是否越界的检查，当 i+cnt >= size 时会导致数组越界访问

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  这里缺少对 i+cnt 是否越界的检查，当 i+cnt >= size 时会导致数组越界访问
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  这里可能导致数组越界，当 i+cnt >= size 时访问非法内存
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.25 , reason:  缺少边界检查，当i+cnt>=size时会导致越界访问；且cnt从未增加，若存在连续相同指数则陷入死循环
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  cnt从未递增，导致无限循环；且未检查越界，可能访问非法内存
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.25 , reason:  Missing bounds check (i+cnt < size) and cnt is never incremented inside the loop, causing out-of-bounds access and infinite loop.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.2 , reason:  Array index out of bounds when i+cnt >= size, should add boundary check i+cnt < size
